docket_entries.description: REMARK: RETURN OF SMALL CLAIMS "NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT". SENT TO: DEFENDANT - GARY CHAN; (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - REFUSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-21-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO OCT-27-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. R. SAHATJIAN (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-27-2020 - JUDGMENT. REMOVED FROM SMALL CLAIMS - CLAIM CALENDAR ON OCT-27-2020 IN DEPT. 506 - PLAINTIFF WARREN LI IS PRESENT. SHUI HING CHEUNG, FRIEND SERVES AS CANTONESE INTERPERTER FOR PLAINTIFF. INTERPERTER OATH IS GIVEN, JOYCE LI, DAUGHTER SERVES AS A WITNESS FOR PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT GARY CHAN IS PRESENT AND WAIVES SERVICE. COMMISSIONER LY TAKES THE BENCH AT 11:00 A.M. AND THE MATTER IS CALLED. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER PANG LY ; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
